user_query: Review the Q2 commercial accounts spreadsheet. Identify any rows where the billed amount does not match the contracted rate and flag the billing inquiries.

steps.input_summary: Analyze tool output and format discrepancy report.
steps.output_summary: Drafted summary of the 3 flagged billing inquiries requiring human review.

final_answer: Audit complete. I scanned 1,250 records in the Q2 commercial ledger. There are 3 discrepancies where the billed amount deviates from the contracted rate. Please review the billing inquiries located on rows 142, 508, and 912.
